channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: S&P 500 futures fall as Broadcom leads tech stocks lower: Live updates
item.description: Rising oil prices and Treasury yields weighed all three major indexes lower on Wednesday.

item.title: SpaceX targets $135 IPO price at valuation of $1.77 trillion
item.description: The valuation would make Elon Musk's company the seventh-biggest in the U.S., above Tesla, which has a market cap of about $1.6 trillion.

item.title: Amazon engineers in Seattle slam employer for building AI data centers while laying off 30,000 staffers
item.description: Amazon engineers called out their employer for conducting mass layoffs while it commits to spending $200 billion this year on AI infrastructure.

item.title: Flesh-eating screwworm is confirmed in the U.S., officials say
Broadcom stock plunges on weak software sales, unchanged AI chip forecast for the year
item.description: Broadcom reported fiscal second-quarter results on Wednesday and missed estimates for revenue.

item.title: MSGS stock to get boost if Knicks can stretch Spurs series to game 6, Guggenheim says
item.description: Guggenheim raised its price target on MSG Sports, saying a Knicks-Spurs NBA Finals Game 6 could add over $15 million in revenue.

item.title: Eli Manning's private equity firm acquires licensing company for NFL Flag in bet on youth sports
item.description: Eli Manning's Brand Velocity Capital announced a deal to acquire youth sports company RCX amid congressional bill to ban private equity from youth sports.

item.title: Elon Musk's net worth poised to sail past $1 trillion in SpaceX IPO
item.description: Based on SpaceX's updated IPO prospectus, Elon Musk owns shares in the company worth over $866 billion.

item.title: Tire giant Pirelli vows legal action as short seller alleges ‘close relationship’ with Russia
item.description: Pirelli has instructed lawyers to take legal action after short seller Grizzly Research claimed the firm has a "close relationship" with Russia.

item.title: SoftBank shares plunge over 11% amid broader tech sell-off
item.description: Shares of SoftBank fell 11% following an overnight sell-off in the U.S. market on the back of wider profit taking in the tech sector.

item.title: Kalshi wants small businesses to hedge like Wall Street. A NYC bar is trying it with Knicks promotion
item.description: A local bar on the Upper East Side is the first small business to hedge with Kalshi over a Knicks game on Wednesday.

item.title: Eli Manning weighs in on Giants QB Jaxson Dart's Trump rally fallout
item.description: Eli Manning spoke about political activities from athletes after Giants QB Jaxson Dart introduced President Donald Trump at a rally.

item.title: CrowdStrike narrowly beats estimates on AI tailwinds, but stock falls 10%
item.description: CrowdStrike shares have rallied nearly 60% this year on skyrocketing demand for cybersecurity in the age of advanced artificial intelligence.

item.title: India's viral 'Cockroach' party has millions of followers. What investors need to know
item.description: A Gen Z-led, social media-first mock political party in India that has amassed millions of followers and is set to hold an in-person protest on Saturday.

item.title: Hidden beneath AI chips, Chinese-made circuit boards raise national security concerns in U.S.
item.description: With demand booming for printed circuit boards, the U.S. government is trying to boost domestic production to move away from reliance on China.

item.title: Senate GOP strips up to $1B for Trump ballroom security from immigration enforcement bill
item.description: GOP leaders reportedly privately concluded that the funding proposal risked derailing the broader immigration bill, both politically and procedurally.

item.title: Nvidia’s big dividend hike could pave the way for higher payouts — who may be next
item.description: Some on Wall Street believe there will be more dividend increases from tech companies following Nvidia's recent move.

item.title: As Honeywell Aerospace readies for its standalone debut, its CEO is forecasting big growth
item.description: By 2030 Honeywell is targeting annual earnings of at least $6.5 billion and full-year free cash flow of at least $4 billion.

item.title: Bitcoin's high-conviction holders are turning into sellers as the crypto's price hits new lows
item.description: In the past two days, bitcoin's highest-conviction holders have sold about $2.4 billion in bitcoin.

item.title: The World Cup will boost these hospitality stocks, Deutsche and Goldman say
item.description: Around 5 billion people – more than half the world's population – tuned into at least parts of the previous World Cup in 2022.

item.title: CrowdStrike is a buy, just not yet. Here's why
item.description: On top of the beat-and-raise, CrowdStrike announced a 4-for-1 stock split. But short-term thinkers sold the stock.

item.title: Save on your next trip with these hotel booking apps
item.description: To score the best deals on hotels and lodging, use these tools to search and save.

item.title: Partners Group warns it could cap more fund withdrawals after triggering private equity rout
item.description: Partners Group said it could cap capital withdrawals from more of its funds after a European gating sparked a private equity stock sell-off on Wednesday.

item.title: ‘Buying stuff like it’s going out of fashion’: Biotech M&A on track for best year since pre-Covid
item.description: Driven by looming patent cliffs, newly buoyant public markets, and Big Pharma's race to beef up their pipelines, dealmaking in 2026 is off to a strong start.

item.title: Jim Cramer warns excess supply could be the next biggest threat to the bull market
item.description: CNBC's Jim Cramer warned that a growing wave of AI-related capital raises could overwhelm investor demand and create a near-term headwind for stocks.

item.title: Sellers are pulling homes off the market at the fastest pace since 2020
item.description: Frustrated sellers are pulling their homes off the market at an increasingly high pace, as demand weakens and bidding wars wane.

item.title: Inside India newsletter: Why Taiwan and South Korea's stock markets have surged past India within a week
item.description: The Indian equity market is losing favour with global investors, as its domestic consumption story weakens and the country lags in AI.

item.title: Asia-Pacific markets fall on renewed Middle East tensions
item.description: Asia-Pacific markets open lower amid renewed tensions between Iran and the U.S. and worries that the conflict may keep inflation elevated.

item.title: GOP Sen. Tillis slams Trump intelligence pick Pulte: 'Don't think he has a prayer'
item.description: Pulte is widely viewed as a Trump loyalist who has targeted the president's political foes during his tenure leading the housing regulatory agency.

item.title: Historic stock rally faces key test
item.description: Two key tech companies reporting earnings after the bell could determine the next move higher or lower.
